summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified Messaging System overhaul. All 15 backend tests passed. UI verification confirmed: Support role color is BLUE (#3B82F6), Staff chat modal works with Enter key sending, P2P Disputes section displays correctly, Role color legend shows correct colors per spec.
critical_code_review_comments: Role colors correctly implemented per СООБЩЕНИЯ.txt spec: Support=#3B82F6 (BLUE), Admin=#EF4444 (RED), Mods=#F59E0B (YELLOW), User=#FFFFFF (WHITE), Merchant=#F97316 (ORANGE), Shop=#8B5CF6 (PURPLE)
seed_data_creation: Test messages sent to staff general chat from admin and support users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified messaging system fully tested. Role colors verified: Support=BLUE (#3B82F6). Staff chat modal accessible via 'Чат персонала' button in admin sidebar. P2P Disputes at /admin/p2p/disputes. User messages at /trader/messages.

1_support_role_color_blue.verified: Support role color is #3B82F6 (BLUE) in both backend API response and frontend UI

features_verified: Modal opens from 'Чат персонала' button in admin sidebar
Messages display with correct role colors
Role color legend at bottom shows: Админы (red), Модераторы (yellow), Поддержка (blue)

endpoints_tested: GET /api/msg/staff/general - Returns conversation and messages with role_colors
POST /api/msg/staff/general - Sends message with correct sender_role and sender_info.color

features_verified: Shows 'Споры P2P' header with 'Арбитраж спорных сделок' subtitle
Empty state shows 'Нет активных споров' when no disputes
Role color legend at bottom with correct colors including blue for Поддержка

ui_verification.admin_panel: Staff Chat button visible in sidebar, opens modal correctly
ui_verification.staff_chat_modal: Messages display with role colors, legend shows blue for Support, Enter key works
ui_verification.p2p_disputes: Page loads correctly, shows empty state or dispute list
ui_verification.user_messages: Page loads at /trader/messages, shows conversations and role legend
